Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 11, 2026

Overview

CK Industries respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect information when you visit our website, contact our team, request product information, or do business with us.

Information We Collect

We may collect information that you choose to share with us, including:

  • Name, phone number, email address, company name, and business address.
  • Product enquiries, order requirements, technical specifications, and delivery details.
  • Messages sent through email, phone, WhatsApp, website forms, or other communication channels.
  • Basic website usage data such as browser type, device information, pages viewed, and approximate visit timing.

How We Use Information

We use collected information to:

  • Respond to enquiries and provide product, technical, trade, or logistics support.
  • Prepare quotations, process orders, coordinate dispatch, and manage customer relationships.
  • Improve our website, product catalogue, service quality, and communication experience.
  • Meet legal, tax, accounting, compliance, and business record requirements.

Sharing of Information

We do not sell personal information. We may share relevant information with employees, distributors, logistics partners, service providers, professional advisors, or government authorities when required to deliver services, complete transactions, protect our rights, or comply with applicable law.

Cookies and Analytics

Our website may use cookies, logs, or similar technologies to understand site performance, improve usability, and remember basic preferences. You can control cookies through your browser settings, though some site features may not work as intended if cookies are disabled.

Data Security and Retention

We use reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational safeguards to protect information. We retain information only as long as needed for business, legal, compliance, and recordkeeping purposes.

Your Choices

You may contact us to request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information, subject to applicable legal and business record requirements. You may also opt out of non-essential communications by contacting us.

Contact Us

For privacy-related questions, contact CK Industries at jsrckindustries@gmail.com or call +91 90302 19096.

Privacy Policy Terms & Conditions
